creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Absolutely. 

The next question is that I'm not sure I want to keep a separate port of LDB for Samba, the hassle it creates to maintain all the Zoo of versions seems to be not worth it.

So I may make ldb23(hm, I see ldb25 on my disk, I wonder now...).

Overall, dependency on LDB doesn't scale with SSSD, as each particular version of Samba depends on its pretty own version of LDB, so usage of the same LDB version by SSSD and Samba could be only accidental.

For 4.17 I want to encapsulate Samba with its satellite libs as private libraries, which, I hope, will make everybody's life easier.
